languages.text: "Такой исход уготован каждому, кто назвался слугой еретика. Его армия пала под натиском {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Сестер Битвы{/g}, ведомых мудростью Эланы. Неважно, к какому роду они принадлежали. Мы не сражаемся с людьми — мы боремся за человечество".
languages.translation_comment:
стартует DL_KnowGaprakAmbushed, DL_KnowElanaNickname
Если не играет DL_TraitorsConspiracy, то DL_JuvennaSuspicion_counter +3

traits.locale_text: "Такой исход уготован каждому, кто назвался слугой еретика. Его армия пала под натиском {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Сестер Битвы{/g}, ведомых мудростью Эланы. Неважно, к какому роду они принадлежали. Мы не сражаемся с людьми — мы боремся за человечество".

стартует DL_KnowGaprakAmbushed, DL_KnowElanaNickname
Если не играет DL_TraitorsConspiracy, то DL_JuvennaSuspicion_counter +3

languages.text: "Such is the fate of any who calls himself the servant of a heretic. His army fell to the onslaught of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g}, guided by Elana's wisdom. It does not matter what house they belonged to. We do not fight against humans — we fight for humanity."
languages.original_text: "Такой исход уготован каждому, кто назвался слугой еретика. Его армия пала под натиском {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Сестер Битвы{/g}, ведомых мудростью Эланы. Неважно, к какому роду они принадлежали. Мы не сражаемся с людьми — мы боремся за человечество".

languages.text: “凡是自称效忠异端的仆从，都是此等下场。在埃拉娜智慧的指引下，{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}战斗修女{/g}的猛烈攻势击溃了他的军队。至于他们隶属什么家族，根本无关紧要。我们并非与人类为敌，我们是在为人类而战。”
languages.original_text: "Such is the fate of any who calls himself the servant of a heretic. His army fell to the onslaught of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g}, guided by Elana's wisdom. It does not matter what house they belonged to. We do not fight against humans — we fight for humanity."

traits.locale_text: “凡是自称效忠异端的仆从，都是此等下场。在埃拉娜智慧的指引下，{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}战斗修女{/g}的猛烈攻势击溃了他的军队。至于他们隶属什么家族，根本无关紧要。我们并非与人类为敌，我们是在为人类而战。”

languages.text: « Tel est le sort qui attend quiconque œuvre au service d'un hérétique. Son armée a succombé à l'assaut des {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sœurs de Bataille{/g}, guidées par la sagesse d'Elana. Qu'importe la maison à laquelle elle appartenait. Dans notre combat pour l'humanité, l'ennemi est l'ennemi, qu'il soit xénos ou humain. »
languages.original_text: "Such is the fate of any who calls himself the servant of a heretic. His army fell to the onslaught of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g}, guided by Elana's wisdom. It does not matter what house they belonged to. We do not fight against humans — we fight for humanity."

traits.locale_text: « Tel est le sort qui attend quiconque œuvre au service d'un hérétique. Son armée a succombé à l'assaut des {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sœurs de Bataille{/g}, guidées par la sagesse d'Elana. Qu'importe la maison à laquelle elle appartenait. Dans notre combat pour l'humanité, l'ennemi est l'ennemi, qu'il soit xénos ou humain. »

languages.text: "Kendisine bir kâfirin hizmetkarı diyen herkesin kaderi budur. Ordusu, Elana'nın bilgeliğiyle yönlendirilen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Harp Rahibeleri'nin{/g} saldırısına uğradı. Hangi haneye mensup oldukları önemsiz. İnsanlara karşı savaşmıyoruz, İnsanlık için savaşıyoruz."
languages.original_text: "Such is the fate of any who calls himself the servant of a heretic. His army fell to the onslaught of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g}, guided by Elana's wisdom. It does not matter what house they belonged to. We do not fight against humans — we fight for humanity."

traits.locale_text: "Kendisine bir kâfirin hizmetkarı diyen herkesin kaderi budur. Ordusu, Elana'nın bilgeliğiyle yönlendirilen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Harp Rahibeleri'nin{/g} saldırısına uğradı. Hangi haneye mensup oldukları önemsiz. İnsanlara karşı savaşmıyoruz, İnsanlık için savaşıyoruz."

languages.text: «Tal es el destino de todos cuantos se hacen llamar sirvientes de un hereje. Su ejército cayó bajo el asalto de las {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Hermanas de Batalla{/g}, guiadas por la sabiduría de Elana. No importa a qué casa pertenecía. No luchamos contra humanos: luchamos por la Humanidad».
languages.original_text: "Such is the fate of any who calls himself the servant of a heretic. His army fell to the onslaught of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g}, guided by Elana's wisdom. It does not matter what house they belonged to. We do not fight against humans — we fight for humanity."

traits.locale_text: «Tal es el destino de todos cuantos se hacen llamar sirvientes de un hereje. Su ejército cayó bajo el asalto de las {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Hermanas de Batalla{/g}, guiadas por la sabiduría de Elana. No importa a qué casa pertenecía. No luchamos contra humanos: luchamos por la Humanidad».

languages.text: "So ergeht es jedem, der sich selbst als Diener eines Ketzers bezeichnet. Seine Armee fiel durch den Angriff der von Elanas Weisheit gelenkten {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sororitas{/g}. Es spielt keine Rolle, welchem Haus sie angehörte. Wir kämpfen nicht gegen Menschen ... wir kämpfen für die Menschheit."
languages.original_text: "Such is the fate of any who calls himself the servant of a heretic. His army fell to the onslaught of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g}, guided by Elana's wisdom. It does not matter what house they belonged to. We do not fight against humans — we fight for humanity."

traits.locale_text: "So ergeht es jedem, der sich selbst als Diener eines Ketzers bezeichnet. Seine Armee fiel durch den Angriff der von Elanas Weisheit gelenkten {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sororitas{/g}. Es spielt keine Rolle, welchem Haus sie angehörte. Wir kämpfen nicht gegen Menschen ... wir kämpfen für die Menschheit."

languages.text: 「異端者のしもべと名乗る者には、このような運命が待ち受けている。エレーナが導く{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}バトルシスターズ{/g}の猛攻に、彼の軍勢は崩壊した。彼らがどの家系に属していたかは重要ではない。我々は人間と戦わない。我々は人類のために戦うのだ。」
languages.original_text: "Such is the fate of any who calls himself the servant of a heretic. His army fell to the onslaught of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g}, guided by Elana's wisdom. It does not matter what house they belonged to. We do not fight against humans — we fight for humanity."

traits.locale_text: 「異端者のしもべと名乗る者には、このような運命が待ち受けている。エレーナが導く{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}バトルシスターズ{/g}の猛攻に、彼の軍勢は崩壊した。彼らがどの家系に属していたかは重要ではない。我々は人間と戦わない。我々は人類のために戦うのだ。」
